title: Email Notification Does not Specify the Group
excerpt: The default system generated email notification does not reference the group name anywhere in the email.  It tells the recipient the board and the item name, but it does not tell the recipient what group it is from. Does…

posts.author: GregC (Greg C)
posts.cookedHtml: The default system generated email notification does not reference the group name anywhere in the email. It tells the recipient the board and the item name, but it does not tell the recipient what group it is from. Does any one else find this super annoying?
